extract: Ice Punch (Japanese: れいとうパンチ Freezing Punch) is a damage-dealing Ice-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM33 in Generation II. TM35 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TM04 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM069 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM024 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It can be thought of as a counterpart to Fire Punch and Thunder Punch, having similar names and effects.
